# Memory

Freeform record of past decisions and recurring style rules. The AI reads this
as global context so it does not re-litigate settled calls.

## Past decisions

- 2026-05: settled on `#B85B33` ("brand orange") as the single hero color. Do
  not introduce a second accent without an explicit ask.
- 2026-05: Geist for both display and body — one typeface, two weights.
- 2026-06: export at 2x for all social artboards.

## Style rules

- Generous whitespace; the canvas is not a billboard.
- Never embed the logo larger than 1/6 of the artboard width.
